      .banner {
  position: relative;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-areas: "text button" "countdown .";
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 3rem;
  gap: 0.25rem 0;
  align-items: center;
  padding-block: 0.5rem;
  padding-inline: 1rem 0;
  font-family: Poppins, sans-serif;
  color: #fff;
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.banner__text {
  grid-area: text;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-align: center;
}
.banner__countdown {
  grid-area: countdown;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: normal;
  text-align: center;
}
.banner__close-button {
  grid-area: button;
  grid-row: 1/-1;
  place-self: center center;
  color: #fff;
  cursor: pointer;
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
}
@media (min-width: 1024px) {
  .banner {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-areas: "left middle right button";
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 3rem;
    padding-inline: 2rem 1rem;
    text-align: left;
  }
  .banner__text {
    grid-area: middle;
    margin-bottom: 0;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
  }
  .banner__countdown {
    grid-area: right;
    text-align: right;
  }
  .banner__close-button {
    display: grid;
    grid-area: button;
    grid-row: -1/1;
    justify-self: center;
  }
}
@media (min-width: 1024px) {
  .banner {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 4fr 1fr 3rem;
  }
}
      .banner {
        background-color: #1A73E8;

data-locale="en" data-template-id="53aa8912dec7e10d38f59f36" data-businessunit-id="5576db350000ff0005800ec6" data-style-height="350px" data-style-width="100%" data-font-family="Poppins" data-theme="light" data-stars="5" data-review-disclaimer="true" data-review-languages="en"> <a href="https://www.trustpilot.com/review/tractive.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Trustpilot</a> </div> </div> </div> <section class="faq-1-grid content-visibility"> <h2 class="section-indicator section-indicator--blue-secondary" id="faq">Frequently Asked Questions</h2> <div class="faq-1-grid__wrapper"> <header class="faq-1-grid__header"> <h3 class="section-headline heading-3">Looking for answers? You've come to the right place.</h3> </header> <div class="faq-1-grid__content"> <article class="collapse accordion js-collapse"> <div role="button" tabindex="0" class="accordion__head js-track-custom-event" id="faq-landing-page-1-page-collapse-button--default" data-tracking-value="How does Tractive work?" data-tracking-action="faqs" data-tracking-label="faq1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="faq-landing-page-1-page-collapse"> <h3> <span class="accordion__headline faq__headline">How does Tractive work?</span> </h3> </div> <div class="collapse__content accordion__content js-collapse-content" role="region" aria-labelledby="faq-landing-page-1-page-collapse-button--default" id="faq-landing-page-1-page-collapse-default"> <p>The Tractive GPS tracker determines its location using GPS satellites and reports it via cellular networks (LTE). That's why it has an integrated SIM card that automatically connects to local cell networks. Unlike AirTag or other Bluetooth tracking devices, the Tractive GPS tracker can locate your pet worldwide, as long as there's sufficient cellular coverage.</p> </div> </article> <article class="collapse accordion js-collapse"> <div role="button" tabindex="0" class="accordion__head js-track-custom-event" id="faq-landing-page-2-page-collapse-button--default" data-tracking-value="Why do I need a subscription and what plans are available?" data-tracking-action="faqs" data-tracking-label="faq2" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="faq-landing-page-2-page-collapse"> <h3> <span class="accordion__headline faq__headline">Why do I need a subscription and what plans are available?</span> </h3> </div> <div class="collapse__content accordion__content js-collapse-content" role="region" aria-labelledby="faq-landing-page-2-page-collapse-button--default" id="faq-landing-page-2-page-collapse-default"> <p>Tractive trackers have a built-in SIM card, like your phone, that uses mobile networks to send you location info. All the fees needed to do that are covered by your subscription. That way, you get to enjoy unlimited range worldwide. You can cancel your subscription at any time. <a href="https://tractive.com/en/c/plans">More information</a></p> </div> </article> <article class="collapse accordion js-collapse"> <div role="button" tabindex="0" class="accordion__head js-track-custom-event" id="faq-landing-page-3-page-collapse-button--default" data-tracking-value="What's the difference between Tractive and AirTag?" data-tracking-action="faqs" data-tracking-label="faq3" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="faq-landing-page-3-page-collapse"> <h3> <span class="accordion__headline faq__headline">What's the difference between Tractive and AirTag?</span> </h3> </div> <div class="collapse__content accordion__content js-collapse-content" role="region" aria-labelledby="faq-landing-page-3-page-collapse-button--default" id="faq-landing-page-3-page-collapse-default"> <p>AirTags need to be close to other Apple devices to track objects. If your pet is not within range of an Apple device, an AirTag won’t be able to find them. Tractive uses GPS and LTE technology to provide accurate live location data in all countries where Tractive works. </p> </div> </article> <article class="collapse accordion js-collapse"> <div role="button" tabindex="0" class="accordion__head js-track-custom-event" id="faq-landing-page-4-page-collapse-button--default" data-tracking-value="What's the battery life of a Tractive GPS Tracker?" data-tracking-action="faqs" data-tracking-label="faq4" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="faq-landing-page-4-page-collapse"> <h3> <span class="accordion__headline faq__headline">What's the battery life of a Tractive GPS Tracker?</span> </h3> </div> <div class="collapse__content accordion__content js-collapse-content" role="region" aria-labelledby="faq-landing-page-4-page-collapse-button--default" id="faq-landing-page-4-page-collapse-default"> <p>Battery life strongly depends on tracker model, coverage, and usage. Setting up Power Saving Zones will give it a significant boost.
